title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.010 - Printed statute books, evidence
text:
490.010.  Printed statute books, evidence. — The printed statute books of this state, printed under its authority, shall be evidence of the private acts therein contained.
(RSMo 1939 § 1812) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1648; 1919 § 5335; 1909 § 6280
